LineItem.description: A single ordered product as expressed in the email.

item_notes.description: Instructions specific to this line item, verbatim. Use null if none.
item_notes.title: Item Notes

product_text.description: The product exactly as the customer wrote it, verbatim. Never map it to a catalog name or product code.
product_text.title: Product Text

quantity.description: The quantity as an integer. Convert number words such as twelve or a dozen to digits. Use null if no quantity is stated; never guess.
quantity.title: Quantity

unit_text.description: The unit word exactly as written, e.g. rolls, ctns, boxes. Use null if none is given.
unit_text.title: Unit Text

LineItem.title: LineItem

description:
Structured purchase order extracted from one customer email.

Every key is required. Use null for anything the email does not state --
never omit a key, never output an empty string, never infer a value.
Copy text verbatim from the email without normalising it.

buyer_name_text.description: The name of the person placing the order, as signed or stated in the email body. Use null if no individual is identifiable.
buyer_name_text.title: Buyer Name Text

customer_po_text.description: The customer purchase order reference exactly as written, e.g. PO-12345. Use null if none is given.
customer_po_text.title: Customer Po Text

delivery_address_text.description: The delivery destination exactly as written, whether a full address or a site name. Use null if not stated.
delivery_address_text.title: Delivery Address Text

line_items.description: One entry per distinct product the customer is ordering. Empty only if no products are identifiable.
line_items.title: Line Items

notes.description: Order-level delivery or handling instructions written by the customer, verbatim. Use null if none.
notes.title: Notes

requested_date_text.description: The requested delivery timing exactly as written, e.g. next Friday, by the 15th, ASAP. Do not convert it to a date. Use null if not stated.
requested_date_text.title: Requested Date Text

title: ExtractedOrder
